message:
fix(tests): gate tls_conformance test modules behind tls feature

The tls_error_tests and tls_disabled_tests modules import from
asupersync::tls which is only available when the tls feature is
enabled. Gate both modules with #[cfg(feature = "tls")] to prevent
compilation errors when building without the tls feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
